title: SciDiagramEdit: Learning to Edit Scientific Diagrams from Paper Revisions

release_audit.paper_release_language: The paper says that the benchmark, curated instruction-revision pairs, atomic-claim annotations, and final evolved skill will be released; the source figures will not be redistributed.
available_at_audit_time: immutable arXiv v1 PDF and HTML
official arXiv source archive, including TeX and paper figures
not_available_at_audit_time: 364-item corpus manifest and arXiv version-pair identifiers
source-figure retrieval scripts or immutable source hashes
editing instructions and 2,628 atomic checklist claims
paper-, author-, project-, and figure-group split assignments
annotation records, curator identities, corrections, or agreement data
initial, candidate, accepted, rejected, and final skill versions
training, validation, test, baseline, or ablation trajectories and outputs
judge and coach prompts, raw judgments, retries, or model snapshots

interpretation: The paper and its source are available and fully reviewable. The promised empirical release was not discoverable from the paper, arXiv landing page/source, GitHub repository search, or Hugging Face dataset/model/space searches at audit time. Absence is time-bounded and does not prove that no later or differently named release exists. No paper result can currently be recomputed or release-audited beyond the manuscript and source figures.
